imageConfig.prompt: A highly cinematic, photorealistic 9:16 vertical shot of a futuristic cyberpunk cafe at night, neon lights reflecting on wet pavement, moody atmosphere

videoConfig.prompt: Cinematic slow dolly push through the cyberpunk cafe scene, neon reflections shimmer on wet surfaces, ambient rain, hyper-realistic
